languages.text: "Обнадеживающие слова. Я слышу в них дух наследни{mf|ка|цы} фон Валанциус". {n}Снисходительная улыбка Себериана скрыта за вокс-решеткой, заменившей его нижнюю челюсть, но проступает в голосе.{/n} "Посмотрим, будут ли они подкреплены делами". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

traits.locale_text: "Обнадеживающие слова. Я слышу в них дух наследни{mf|ка|цы} фон Валанциус". {n}Снисходительная улыбка Себериана скрыта за вокс-решеткой, заменившей его нижнюю челюсть, но проступает в голосе.{/n} "Посмотрим, будут ли они подкреплены делами". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

languages.text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

languages.text: «Me alegra oír esas palabras. Demuestra con ellas el espíritu de un{mf||a} dign{mf|o|a} hereder{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius». {n}La sonrisa condescendiente de Seberian queda oculta por la rejilla de voco que sustituye su mandíbula inferior, pero su tono la deja ver pese a todo.{/n} «Aunque ya veremos qué dicen sus acciones al respecto». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: «Me alegra oír esas palabras. Demuestra con ellas el espíritu de un{mf||a} dign{mf|o|a} hereder{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius». {n}La sonrisa condescendiente de Seberian queda oculta por la rejilla de voco que sustituye su mandíbula inferior, pero su tono la deja ver pese a todo.{/n} «Aunque ya veremos qué dicen sus acciones al respecto». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».

languages.text: “这话倒是挺鼓舞人心。我从中听到了冯·瓦兰修斯继承人的气魄。”{n}塞贝里安那居高临下的笑意藏在了取代他下巴的音阵格栅后面，但仍能从他的声音里听出来。{/n}“且看你能否说到做到。”{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: “这话倒是挺鼓舞人心。我从中听到了冯·瓦兰修斯继承人的气魄。”{n}塞贝里安那居高临下的笑意藏在了取代他下巴的音阵格栅后面，但仍能从他的声音里听出来。{/n}“且看你能否说到做到。”{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”

languages.text: « Des paroles encourageantes. J'y perçois l'esprit d'{mf|un authentique héritier|une authentique héritière} des von Valancius. » {n}Le sourire condescendant de Seberian a beau être masqué par la grille-vox qui a remplacé sa mâchoire inférieure, il transparaît dans le ton de sa voix.{/n} « Nous verrons bien si les actes suivent. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: « Des paroles encourageantes. J'y perçois l'esprit d'{mf|un authentique héritier|une authentique héritière} des von Valancius. » {n}Le sourire condescendant de Seberian a beau être masqué par la grille-vox qui a remplacé sa mâchoire inférieure, il transparaît dans le ton de sa voix.{/n} « Nous verrons bien si les actes suivent. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »

languages.text: "Cesaret verici sözler. Sözlerinde bir von Valancius vârisinin ruhunu duyuyorum." {n}Seberian'ın küçümseyici gülümsemesi, alt çenesinin yerini alan voks ızgarasının arkasında saklansa da sesinden fark ediliyor.{/n} "Eylemlerinin de benzer olup olmayacağını göreceğiz." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: "Cesaret verici sözler. Sözlerinde bir von Valancius vârisinin ruhunu duyuyorum." {n}Seberian'ın küçümseyici gülümsemesi, alt çenesinin yerini alan voks ızgarasının arkasında saklansa da sesinden fark ediliyor.{/n} "Eylemlerinin de benzer olup olmayacağını göreceğiz." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."

languages.text: 「励ましの言葉。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の血を引く者としての精神を感じます。」{n}セベリアンは下顎に代わって装着されたボイス・グリルの奥で、鼻で笑うような声で言った。{/n}「行動が言葉に続くかどうかは、我々が見極めることだ。」{n}セベリアンは突然よろめきながらも、強い意志で立ち直る。{/n}「そして、今は休息が必要だ。」
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: 「励ましの言葉。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の血を引く者としての精神を感じます。」{n}セベリアンは下顎に代わって装着されたボイス・グリルの奥で、鼻で笑うような声で言った。{/n}「行動が言葉に続くかどうかは、我々が見極めることだ。」{n}セベリアンは突然よろめきながらも、強い意志で立ち直る。{/n}「そして、今は休息が必要だ。」

languages.text: "Ermutigende Worte. Ich höre den Geist {mf|eines|einer} von Valancius in ihnen." {n}Seberians herablassendes Lächeln ist hinter dem Vox-Gitter verborgen, das seinen Unterkiefer ersetzt, in seiner Stimme aber deutlich zu erkennen.{/n} "Wir werden ja sehen, ob Taten folgen." {n}Plötzlich wankt Seberian, zwingt sich aber mit schierer Willenskraft, aufrecht stehen zu bleiben.{/n} "Und nun brauche ich Ruhe."
languages.original_text: "Encouraging words. I hear in them the spirit of a von Valancius heir." {n}Seberian's condescending smile is hidden behind the vox-grille that has replaced his lower jaw, yet it is audible in his voice.{/n} "We shall see whether deeds follow." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."
